subcodes.first_line: O ye two servants of the Desired One! Praise be to God, the All-Forgiving Lord, Who hath made you successful in righteous deeds in this Day of Manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده حضرت مقصود الحمد لله رب غفور شما را در یوم ظهور بعمل مبرور موفق
subcodes.subjects: @many are called but few are chosen, @praise and encouragement
